Game.Name: Sword World SFC (Japan)
Game.plot: Overview:Sword World SFC is a Super Famicom (the SFC in the title refers to the Super Famicom) adaptation of Sword World RPG, a fantasy RPG table-top game. The game is open-ended and intended for multiplayer play in order to recreate the table-top game as closely as possible. This also includes a faithful recreation of the table-top game's ruleset.Sword World also received a similar NEC PC-9801 adaptation prior to this game, called Sword World PC. Sword World SFC also saw a sequel in Sword World SFC 2: Inishie no Kyojin Densetsu.
Game.Notes: Sword World SFC is a Super Famicom (the SFC in the title refers to the Super Famicom) adaptation of Sword World RPG, a fantasy RPG table-top game. The game is open-ended and intended for multiplayer play in order to recreate the table-top game as closely as possible. This also includes a faithful recreation of the table-top game's ruleset.
